parallelizable_groups: CP-1: TASK-DB-001 and TASK-FE-001 after TASK-INFRA-001
CP-2: TASK-SAFETY-001, TASK-AI-001, TASK-FE-CHAT-001 after TASK-API-001
CP-3: All API route tasks after DB models complete
CP-3: TASK-CHESS-001, TASK-SPOT-001, TASK-WTHR-001 after TASK-APP-001
CP-4: Mission Control, collaborative, OAuth after core integration

tasks.title: Monorepo scaffold + Chatbox fork setup on branch v2
tasks.description: Create branch v2 on Chatbox fork. Set up pnpm monorepo: @chatbridge/shared (Zod schemas), @chatbridge/backend (Fastify), @chatbridge/sdk (developer SDK). Add docker-compose.yml for Postgres 16 + Redis 7. Configure Vitest. Create .env.example. README with architecture overview.
negative_constraints: Do NOT modify Chatbox core code yet — scaffold only
Do NOT install Python packages
Do NOT create separate repos
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: docker-compose up works, pnpm install succeeds, shared package imports work

tasks.title: Langfuse self-hosted setup + observability scaffold
tasks.description: Add Langfuse to docker-compose (or Railway). Create observability module in @chatbridge/backend with trace wrapper. Every LLM call from CP-2 onward must be traced. Pseudonymous user IDs only.
negative_constraints: Do NOT put PII in traces
Do NOT make Langfuse calls synchronous in request path
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: Langfuse trace created on mock LLM call, PII detection on trace payloads

tasks.title: Prompt externalization + versioning scaffold
tasks.description: Create prompt registry in @chatbridge/backend. Prompts stored as versioned templates (not in code). System prompt assembly: base + classroom_config + grade_band + tool_schemas + whisper + safety. Integrate with Langfuse prompt management.
negative_constraints: Do NOT hardcode prompts in TypeScript source files
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: prompt template loads by version, assembly includes all components

tasks.title: Prisma schema + migrations + RLS policies
tasks.description: Create Prisma schema for all 19 entities from data_model.yaml. Run initial migration. Create RLS policies via raw SQL migration for all 17 tenant-scoped tables. Create Prisma middleware for SET LOCAL per transaction. Test cross-tenant isolation.
negative_constraints: Do NOT use SET (session-scoped) — only SET LOCAL
Do NOT skip RLS on any tenant-scoped table
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: migration succeeds, RLS blocks cross-tenant query, SET LOCAL resets per transaction

tasks.title: Seed data + test fixtures
tasks.description: Create seed script: 2 districts, 2 schools, 3 classrooms, 5 users (student K-2, student 9-12, teacher, admin, developer), 3 apps (chess, spotify, weather registered). Create test fixture factory for integration tests.
negative_constraints: Do NOT use fake/placeholder data that looks real
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: seed runs without error, fixtures create valid records

tasks.title: Fastify server scaffold + middleware stack
tasks.description: Create Fastify server with: @fastify/swagger (auto-OpenAPI at /docs), @fastify/cors, @fastify/rate-limit (Redis-backed), @fastify/websocket, pino logging. Add middleware: JWT auth, RLS tenant context, audit logging hook. Health endpoint with capability probes (DB, Redis, Anthropic).
negative_constraints: Do NOT disable /docs or /openapi.json (L-001)
Health must report capability status, not just connectivity (L-002)
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: server starts, /docs returns 200, /health returns capability status, rate limiter triggers at threshold

tasks.title: Auth routes: LTI 1.3 + JWT + RBAC
tasks.description: Implement auth routes: POST /auth/lti/launch (ltijs), POST /auth/login (fallback JWT), GET/POST /auth/oauth/spotify/* (OAuth2 flow). JWT issuance with role + district_id. RBAC preHandler hooks. COPPA consent check for under-13.
negative_constraints: Do NOT store passwords — all auth via SSO/LTI/OAuth
OAuth via popup, NOT redirect
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: JWT issued with correct claims, RBAC blocks unauthorized routes, under-13 without consent blocked

tasks.title: Chatbox branch v2 + shared package integration
tasks.description: Create branch v2 in Chatbox fork. Add @chatbridge/shared as workspace dependency. Extend MessageContentPartSchema with app-card type. Configure backend API client. Add WebSocket client module with auto-reconnect.
negative_constraints: Minimize changes to core Chatbox files — use extension points identified in codebase audit
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: app-card schema validates, WebSocket client connects/reconnects

tasks.title: Grade-band adaptive CSS variables
tasks.description: Create CSS variable system for 4 grade bands (K-2, 3-5, 6-8, 9-12). Variables for font-size, line-height, touch-target-size, spacing, information-density. Driven by classroom config from API. Apply DM Sans font.
negative_constraints: Do NOT create separate component variants per grade band — single adaptive UI (CLR-001)
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: K-2 returns 18-20px font, 9-12 returns 15px, CSS variables apply correctly

tasks.title: Classroom CRUD + config routes
tasks.description: Implement classroom routes: POST /classrooms (create with join code), GET/PATCH /classrooms/{id}/config, GET /classrooms/{id}/apps, PATCH /classrooms/{id}/apps/{appId} (toggle). App catalog from DistrictAppCatalog filtered by district RLS.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: classroom created with join code, config updates, app toggle works, RLS scopes to district

tasks.title: Product README + architecture docs in repo
tasks.description: Copy all spec artifacts into product repo specs/ directory (L-080). Write README.md with architecture overview, setup guide, API documentation link. Create docs/architecture.md with system overview.
negative_constraints: Do NOT generate docs without substance — must reflect actual architecture
tasks.tdd_note: N/A — documentation task

tasks.title: Tracer bullet deployment to Railway
tasks.description: Deploy minimal stack to Railway: Fastify backend (health endpoint), Chatbox web build (static), managed Postgres, managed Redis. Verify: frontend reachable, backend starts, DB migrated, /health returns capability status.
negative_constraints: Do NOT wait for full features — deploy the shell
tasks.tdd_note: Verification: curl health endpoint returns 200 with capability status

tasks.title: Langfuse deployment on Railway
tasks.description: Deploy self-hosted Langfuse on Railway as separate service with dedicated Postgres. Verify traces arrive from backend.
negative_constraints: Do NOT use cloud-hosted Langfuse — must be self-hosted for COPPA
tasks.tdd_note: Verification: trace created in Langfuse when backend makes LLM call

tasks.title: Create 4-stage content safety pipeline
tasks.description: Implement 4-stage pipeline: (1) PII detection (regex: phone, email, SSN, address), (2) injection detection (13 regex patterns), (3) LLM classification (Sonnet: safe/violence/sexual/hate/self_harm/off_topic), (4) crisis detection (keyword scan, always runs). Total budget <600ms.
negative_constraints: Crisis detection MUST always run regardless of prior stages
Do NOT use single-prompt approach
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: PII redacted, injection detected, classification categories correct, crisis resources returned. Test each stage independently + pipeline end-to-end.

tasks.title: Wire safety pipeline into message endpoint
tasks.description: Wire safety pipeline into POST /conversations/{id}/messages. Blocked→422, critical→200+resources, safe→202. Wire output guardrails into AI response path.
tasks.tdd_note: Integration tests: blocked message returns 422, crisis returns 200+resources, safe returns 202

tasks.title: AI service: streaming + tool use orchestration
tasks.description: Create AI service using Vercel AI SDK. Streaming chat responses via WebSocket. Dynamic tool schema injection from enabled classroom apps. Context window management (app state > config > messages > schemas). Conservative routing: invoke tools only on clear explicit intent.
negative_constraints: Do NOT invoke tools speculatively — clear intent only (CLR-004)
Do NOT exceed context window — truncate oldest messages first
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: tool schemas injected correctly, 'let's play chess' invokes tool, 'I'm bored' does NOT invoke tool, context window respects priority order

tasks.title: Wire AI service into chat endpoint + WebSocket streaming
tasks.description: Wire AI service into the chat message flow. Student message → safety pipeline → AI service → streaming via WebSocket. First token <1s. Tool invocations trigger app lifecycle.
tasks.tdd_note: Integration tests: message triggers AI response, streaming works, tool invocation returns result

tasks.title: Chat UI: message rendering + streaming + suggestion chips
tasks.description: Extend Chatbox message renderer to: stream AI responses via WebSocket, display typing indicator within 200ms, render suggestion chips (2-3 contextual) after AI response. K-2 mode: complete message display (no streaming).
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: message renders, streaming tokens appear, K-2 shows complete message, chips appear after response

tasks.title: App card renderer: iframe sandbox + CBP client
tasks.description: Create AppCardPartUI component: sandboxed iframe rendering inline in chat. Lifecycle states (loading skeleton → active → suspended thumbnail → collapsed summary → error). postMessage handler with origin validation. CBP client for JSON-RPC 2.0.
negative_constraints: sandbox='allow-scripts' only — NEVER allow-same-origin
Validate postMessage origin before processing
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: iframe renders with sandbox attrs, origin validation rejects unknown origins, lifecycle states transition correctly

tasks.title: App registration + tool invocation routes
tasks.description: Implement: POST /apps/register, POST /apps/{id}/tools/{name}/invoke (with 5s timeout), POST /apps/{id}/commands (CBP dispatch via Redis Pub/Sub), PUT/GET /apps/instances/{id}/state. PII stripping on outbound CBP commands.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: registration creates app, tool invocation returns result, timeout at 5s, CBP dispatch via Redis, PII stripped

tasks.title: App lifecycle FSM + single-active constraint
tasks.description: Implement formal state machine from workflow_fsm.yaml. Enforce single-active: new invocation suspends current. Invalid transitions rejected. State persisted to AppInstance.state_snapshot.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: valid transitions succeed, invalid transitions rejected, single-active enforced, completion collapses card

tasks.title: App health monitoring + resource limits
tasks.description: Implement health checks for registered apps. Resource limit enforcement (50MB memory, 100 req/min). Degraded apps stop being invoked. Events logged.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: resource violation terminates app, degraded app not invocable

tasks.title: Chess app: iframe bundle + CBP integration
tasks.description: Build chess app as standalone iframe bundle using chess.js. Interactive board with drag-and-drop, legal move validation, highlighted valid squares. CBP integration: send state_update on every move (FEN), receive commands, signal completion on checkmate/stalemate/resignation. Register with platform.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: legal moves accepted, illegal rejected, FEN sent via CBP, completion signaled on checkmate

tasks.title: AI chess analysis: board state reasoning
tasks.description: Implement AI analysis of chess board position. When student asks 'what should I do?', AI reads FEN from context and provides grade-appropriate tactical advice. K-2: simple guidance. 9-12: tactical analysis.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: given FEN + 'what should I do?', AI response references actual board position, grade-appropriate

tasks.title: Spotify app: OAuth + playlist creation
tasks.description: Build Spotify app: OAuth2 popup flow, track search, playlist creation. AI natural language → search params → create playlist. Token refresh. App card shows playlist with tracks and Spotify link.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: OAuth flow stores token, search returns tracks, playlist created, token refresh works

tasks.title: Weather app: API + visual dashboard
tasks.description: Build weather app: fetch from OpenWeatherMap API, render visual dashboard (temp, conditions, 5-day forecast, icons). 10-minute cache. Graceful fallback on API failure.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: weather data fetched, dashboard renders, cache works, stale data shown on failure

tasks.title: Chat routes: messages + history + conversation CRUD
tasks.description: Implement: POST /conversations/{id}/messages (full flow: safety → AI → response), GET /conversations/{id}/messages (paginated history with app cards). Conversation CRUD.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: message creates record, history paginated, app cards included in history

tasks.title: Whisper routes: real-time + async guidance
tasks.description: Implement POST /classrooms/{id}/students/{sid}/whisper (real-time injection into AI context). Async guidance via PATCH /classrooms/{id}/config. Whisper content never visible to student.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: whisper stored, AI response reflects guidance, student cannot see whisper

tasks.title: COPPA consent routes + parental flow
tasks.description: Implement: POST /consent/request (send email to parent), consent verification endpoint, POST /consent/delete-request (data deletion within 30 days). Under-13 gate blocks access without consent.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: under-13 blocked without consent, consent request sent, deletion request accepted

tasks.title: Audit trail + safety event logging
tasks.description: Implement Fastify onResponse hook for audit logging (append-only). Safety event logging. Admin query routes: GET /admin/safety-events, GET /admin/audit-trail, GET /admin/tool-invocations.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: every API call creates audit record, safety events logged, admin queries work with RLS

tasks.title: Automated app review pipeline
tasks.description: Implement 5-stage review: schema validation, static security scan (CSP, external scripts, data exfiltration), runtime content safety scan, accessibility audit, performance profiling. POST /apps/{id}/submit-review, GET /apps/{id}/review-results.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: valid app passes, external scripts fail security, results per-check

tasks.title: Developer SDK: CBP client library + docs
tasks.description: Create @chatbridge/sdk: TypeScript library for building ChatBridge apps. CBP client (postMessage wrapper), lifecycle hooks (onActivate, onSuspend, onTerminate), state management helpers, type definitions. API documentation.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: SDK connects to platform, sends/receives CBP messages, lifecycle hooks fire

tasks.title: Eval harness scaffold: rubrics + golden dataset
tasks.description: Create eval harness: load 20 golden dataset scenarios from PRD Section 11d. Scoring rubrics (chat quality, routing accuracy, safety precision/recall). Integration with Langfuse eval pipelines. Runnable before each deployment.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: golden dataset loads, scorer produces per-dimension results, baseline recorded

tasks.title: Full chat-to-app integration: chess end-to-end
tasks.description: Wire the complete flow: student types 'let's play chess' → AI invokes tool → app card renders with chess board → student makes moves → AI analyzes board → game ends → card collapses → AI discusses game. This is the signature experience.
tasks.tdd_note: E2E test: full chess lifecycle. This must feel seamless.

tasks.title: Full Spotify integration: OAuth + playlist
tasks.description: Wire: student asks for playlist → AI invokes Spotify → OAuth popup if needed → search tracks → create playlist → app card shows playlist. Token refresh transparent.
tasks.tdd_note: Integration test: OAuth flow, playlist created with real Spotify API (--live flag)

tasks.title: Full Weather integration
tasks.description: Wire: student asks about weather → AI invokes weather tool → app card shows dashboard with real data.
tasks.tdd_note: Integration test: weather data fetched, dashboard renders

tasks.title: Mission Control: student grid + real-time monitoring
tasks.description: Build Mission Control page: real-time grid of 30 students via WebSocket. Color-coded status (green/amber/red). Last activity, current app. Safety alert cards slide in from right. Uses WS /ws/mission-control.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: grid renders 30 students, status updates in real time, alerts appear

tasks.title: Mission Control: whisper + classroom config UI
tasks.description: Add whisper input to Mission Control: teacher types guidance for specific student, sends via API. Classroom config panel: AI mode, subject, tone, app toggles. Async guidance input.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: whisper sends, config saves, app toggles update

tasks.title: Collaborative sessions: backend + turn enforcement
tasks.description: Implement: POST /collaborative-sessions, POST /sessions/{code}/join. Turn-based enforcement via server-authoritative state. State sync via Redis Pub/Sub. WS /ws/collab/{sessionId}. Teacher observation and close.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: session created, join works, turn enforced, state syncs, teacher can close

tasks.title: Collaborative chess: frontend + multi-player
tasks.description: Wire collaborative chess: two students see same board, turns enforced, AI observes both. Color assignment. Disconnect handling with 5-min reconnection window.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: two players see same board, turn violation rejected, disconnect preserves position

tasks.title: District admin portal: app catalog + analytics
tasks.description: Build admin pages: app catalog (review results, approve/reject/suspend), aggregate analytics (per-school, per-classroom), safety event viewer, audit trail viewer. District-wide app suspension button.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: catalog shows apps, approve/reject works, suspend cascades, analytics load

tasks.title: LTI 1.3: grade passback + deep linking + NRPS
tasks.description: Implement LTI AGS (grade passback for graded activities), deep linking (direct activity launch), NRPS (class roster sync). Integrate with ltijs.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: grade posted to LMS, deep link resolves, roster syncs

tasks.title: Eval baseline recording
tasks.description: Run eval harness against golden dataset. Record baseline scores per dimension. Store in Langfuse. Block deployment if any dimension below threshold.
tasks.tdd_note: Run golden dataset, verify all dimensions pass thresholds

tasks.title: Infrastructure failure modes: Redis, PostgreSQL, WebSocket
tasks.description: Implement FR-INFRA-001 (Redis failure: degrade to direct DB), FR-INFRA-002 (Postgres failure: 503 + maintenance page), FR-INFRA-003 (WebSocket reconnect with exponential backoff).
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: Redis down → chat still works (slower), Postgres down → 503, WS reconnects

tasks.title: Motion spec implementation
tasks.description: Implement all animations from motion_spec.md: message entry, app card transitions, tool invocation pill, suggestion chip stagger. Grade-band adaptations (K-2 slower). Reduced motion support.
tasks.tdd_note: Visual verification: animations match spec, reduced motion disables all

tasks.title: Accessibility audit + fixes
tasks.description: Run axe-core audit. Fix all WCAG 2.1 AA violations. Keyboard navigation for chat + app cards + Mission Control. Screen reader labels for all interactive elements. Focus management for iframe lifecycle.
tasks.tdd_note: Tests: axe-core zero violations, tab navigation works, screen reader announces state changes

tasks.title: Performance optimization
tasks.description: Optimize: FCP <1.5s, CLS <0.1, app card load <2s p95. Bundle size optimization for web build. Lazy loading for Mission Control and admin routes.
tasks.tdd_note: Lighthouse scores, CLS measurement, load time benchmarks

tasks.title: Eval regression check
tasks.description: Re-run eval harness against golden dataset. Verify no dimension dropped below baseline. If regression detected, fix before release.
tasks.tdd_note: All eval dimensions ≥ baseline scores from CP-4

tasks.title: Design fidelity audit + token compliance
tasks.description: Verify: token usage ≥85%, DM Sans rendering, color contrast passes, spacing on 4px grid. Screenshot every page and compare to wireframes. Fidelity ≥80% to pass.
tasks.tdd_note: Visual comparison: screenshots vs wireframes, token scan
